params.name: Golden Trophy
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.11%)
* Avatar Value Pack II ($49.99)
params.description:
On Nov 30, 1941, the first Golden Trophy was awarded to the best actors of the ti me. 

Designed by George Stanley, this iconic gold-plated statuette of a man holding a long sword is standing on a five-ring disc is awarded to encourage the production of an performance in excellent films. Covering a variety of genres, with more than 20 different awards, it is also the world's oldest award in entertainment and is the most coveted of movie awards around the world.

[Basic Info]

Height: 13.5 inches …
